commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=266c66e562ce18f4966117ea39de59def915d084)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `getDefaultSessionDir` to encode separators as `%2F/%5C/%3A` and adds a `continueRecent` header-cwd mismatch guard in `src/agents/sessions/session-manager.ts`.

PR surface: Source +16. Total +16 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.10 show the lossy default session-directory encoder and cwd-blind recent-session selection, and the linked issue includes a concrete repro for wrong-project resume.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor follow-up is needed for code repair and real behavior proof; the missing proof gate makes this a human-review path rather than a ClawSweeper repair marker candidate.

target.title: fix(session): percent-encode path separators in session dir to prevent cross-project collision
target.body:
## Summary
- `getDefaultSessionDir` previously replaced `/`, `\`, `:` all with `-`, making the transform non-injective — distinct paths like `/home/a/b-c` and `/home/a/b/c` collided to the same session directory
- Fix: use URI percent-encoding (`%2F`, `%5C`, `%3A`) for path separators so the encoding is injective and reversible
- Add cwd verification in `continueRecent` as defense-in-depth: if the session header cwd doesn't match the requested cwd, start a fresh session instead of silently resuming the wrong project

## Test plan
- [ ] `/home/alice/dev/client/app` and `/home/alice/dev/client-app` encode to different session directories
- [ ] `continueRecent` from one project never resumes the other project's session
- [ ] Explicit `/new` and `/reset` behavior is unchanged

Fixes #96542

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: krissding
